auth.error_message: Please check your email or password
auth.error_locked: Your account is locked. Please contact support.

welcome.title: Welcome aboard
welcome.subtitle: Before creating a project, follow the guide below to see the organic flow from mobile demo to dashboard monitoring.
welcome.step1_desc: Create a new project with one click in the web console and instantly issue a unique API Key for system integration and testing.
welcome.step2_desc: On the Settings page, change the liveness detection settings and privacy display consent that determine forgery detection. The moment you change a setting, the mobile demo (face/palm) screen UI and validation rules sync in real time.
welcome.step3_desc: Data tested in the demo syncs to UNIVS Gate in real time. Monitor the feature point list and real-time log details with success/failure results.

auth_type.select: Which auth method will you use?

project_type.select: What kind of project are you making?
project_type.immutable_hint: This cannot be changed after creation, so choose carefully.
project_type.standard_desc: | Supports all development settings from API integration to build your own service.
project_type.external_desc: | Optimizes pre-built data flows and runs your service environment right away.
project_type.package_key_placeholder: Enter the package key of the app to integrate

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.demo_qr_scan_desc: Point your mobile camera at the QR to open the demo page
dashboard.stat_verify_image_tip: 1:1 image auth attempts in the period

projects.goal_label: What will you use it for?
projects.create_success_subtitle: Your project has been successfully created.
projects.create_error_generic: An error occurred while creating the project.
projects.max_hint: Up to {{max}} projects can be created.

trial.welcome_line2: Let's create your first project to get started!
trial.full_access: You now have full access to Univs Gate's premium tools.
trial.period_desc: Usage quota available during free trial period
trial.premium_desc: All premium plan features available in limited quantities.
trial.diff_dashboard_desc: Get data-driven insights on security funnel performance and authentication success rates.
trial.diff_logs_desc: Monitor all authentication attempts in real time with detailed metadata and diagnostic information.
trial.diff_sandbox_desc: Test your SDK and API in a safe, isolated environment before deploying to production.

logs.title: Log Detail
logs.description: View API call history and analyze results.
logs.search_placeholder: Search by Request ID, FID, or Memo

features.title: Feature Management
features.edit_photo_click_hint: Click the photo to change it.
features.edit_fail_subtitle: This may be a temporary error. Please try again later.
features.edit_success_subtitle: The registration info has been successfully updated.
features.delete_dialog_body: This cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to delete this item?
features.register_photo_hint: Click the photo area to upload.
features.register_subtitle: Upload a clear photo and enter a memo.

module_test.title: Module Test
module_test.qr_load_error: Failed to load the QR code.
module_test.share_template_desc: Open the link below on your mobile device or scan the QR code to start testing.
module_test.overview_subtitle: Test UnivsAI biometric modules instantly on mobile by scanning a QR code.
module_test.overview_demo_desc: Start testing immediately with just your API key. Scan the QR code and experience the authentication flow without any additional configuration.
module_test.overview_token_desc: Validate authentication flows in a near-production environment using SDK tokens. Ideal for in-depth testing before going live.
module_test.overview_register_desc: Register a user's face and issue a unique FID.
module_test.overview_verify_desc: Compare a registered FID with the current face to verify identity.
module_test.overview_match_desc: Identify the closest match among registered users for the current face.
module_test.overview_liveness_desc: Anti-spoofing check to determine if the subject is a real person.
module_test.overview_step1: Select the authentication module you want to test from the left panel.
module_test.overview_step2: Choose Demo mode or Token mode from the top of the screen.
module_test.overview_step3: Scan the displayed QR code with your mobile camera.
module_test.overview_step4: Complete the authentication on mobile and review the results.
module_test.overview_disabled_hint: Please enable this mode in Settings.
module_test.scan_desc: Scan the QR code on the PC screen or paste the copied link into your mobile browser.
module_test.memo_desc: Please enter the information required for identity verification.
module_test.face_desc: Please look straight ahead following the on-screen guidelines.
module_test.face_desc_bright: Look straight ahead. Shooting in bright light will recognize you faster and more accurately.
module_test.liveness_face_desc: Move your head or blink according to the instructions.
module_test.enrollment_done_desc: Try the service using your issued unique identifier (FID).
module_test.fid_desc: Enter the FID issued during enrollment. If you don't remember your FID, you can find it using the memo from enrollment.
module_test.verification_fail: If authentication failed, try facing the camera directly and taking the photo again!
module_test.matching_fail: If authentication failed, move your face closer to the camera and take the photo again.
module_test.liveness_result_desc: Check the real-time spoofing detection result.
module_test.liveness_on_desc:
Liveness verification is activated.
Follow the instructions and look straight at the camera.
module_test.liveness_off_desc:
Liveness detection is currently off.
Turn it on in Settings to verify real-person authenticity.
module_test.scan_phone: Scan the QR code on your phone
module_test.fid_search_title: Enter FID and get QR code
module_test.search_placeholder: Enter memo or FID from enrollment
module_test.scan_desc_short: Scan the QR code or run the link.

signup.title: Let's get started!
signup.subtitle:
Tell us the email you'll use to sign up.
We'll send you a verification code.
signup.age_consent: I am 14 years of age or older.
signup.terms_consent: I agree to the Terms of Service. (Required)
signup.privacy_consent: I agree to the collection and use of personal information. (Required)
signup.marketing_consent: I agree to the collection and use of personal information for marketing purposes. (Optional)
signup.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
signup.terms_required: Please agree to all required terms to continue.
signup.error_email_in_use: This email is already in use.

verify.title: Please enter the verification code
verify.subtitle:
We sent an 8-digit code to your email.
Please check your inbox (or spam folder).
verify.change_email: Want to enter a different email?
verify.error_wrong_code: The verification code does not match.

set_password.title: Set your password
set_password.subtitle: Please enter a secure password.
set_password.password_invalid: Password must be at least 8 characters.
set_password.error_email_in_use: This email is already in use.
set_password.error_not_verified: Email verification required. Please try again.
set_password.error_generic: An error occurred during signup. Please try again.

mobile_test.module_register_desc: Experience safe and accurate face enrollment with Univs Gate.
mobile_test.module_verify_desc: Verify identity 1:1 by face using FID.
mobile_test.module_match_desc: Find the most similar registered user by face.
mobile_test.module_liveness_desc: Determine if the face is real, not a photo or video.
mobile_test.input_title:
Enter a memo to identify
yourself later
mobile_test.camera_error:
Cannot access camera.
Please check browser permissions.
mobile_test.verify_fail_desc: Authentication failed. Similarity {{pct}}% was too low.
mobile_test.match_fail_desc: Authentication failed. Similarity {{pct}}% was too low.
mobile_test.liveness_on_desc:
Liveness verification mode is active.
Look straight ahead and press the capture button.
mobile_test.liveness_off_desc:
Liveness is not applied.
Look straight ahead and press the capture button.
mobile_test.liveness_fail_desc: The face was determined to be non-real.
mobile_test.invalid_link:
Invalid link.
Please scan the QR code again.
mobile_test.process_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
mobile_test.demo_disabled_desc:
The mobile demo service for this project
is currently disabled.
Please contact the project administrator
for further assistance.
mobile_test.token_disabled_desc:
The token mode service for this project
is currently disabled.
Please contact the project administrator
for further assistance.

settings.title: Settings
settings.privacy_consent_desc: Choose whether to display personal information on the feature registration screen.
settings.consent_desc: Configure whether to expose personal information (name, photo, etc.) in the feature list and log details.
settings.consent_note: When enabled, a 'Privacy Consent Based' badge and the last changed date will appear at the top of the features management screen.
settings.consent_note_inactive: Currently inactive. No personal data including photos or names will be stored.
settings.consent_note_active: You have consented to personal data exposure. Names and face photos will be displayed on screen.
settings.consent_activate_subtitle: Changing this setting will lower your security level and expose sensitive personal data on monitoring screens.
settings.consent_deactivate_subtitle_1: Changing this setting will hide personal data from monitoring screens,
settings.consent_deactivate_subtitle_2: and no captured photo data will be stored anywhere.
settings.consent_expose_info_content: Captured face photo (original), name, palm photo
settings.consent_hide_info_content: Captured face photo (original), palm photo, name
settings.consent_activate_bullet_1: Real-time match log: face image original, name visible
settings.consent_activate_bullet_2: Feature management list: registered face image original, name visible
settings.consent_deactivate_bullet_1: Real-time match log: face image original, name not visible
settings.consent_deactivate_bullet_2: Feature management list: registered face image original, name not visible
settings.consent_agree_note: By agreeing to activate, you consent to displaying names and photos on the above screens.
settings.consent_activate_bullet_1_text: Real-time match log: face image original, name
settings.consent_activate_bullet_2_text: Feature list: registered face image original, name
settings.consent_deactivate_bullet_1_text: Real-time match log: face image original, name
settings.consent_deactivate_bullet_2_text: Feature list: registered face image original, name
settings.liveness_desc: Select whether to use the liveness feature to verify a real person is present during feature registration and verification.
settings.account_edit_success_subtitle: Account information has been successfully updated.
settings.project_edit_success_subtitle: Project information has been successfully updated.
settings.password_change_invalid_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.password_change_error: Failed to change password. Please check your current password.
settings.password_change_success_subtitle: Your password has been successfully changed.
settings.demo_mode_desc: Configure whether the mobile demo page is active in module test demo mode.
settings.demo_mode_on_desc: The demo tab and mobile demo test page are active.
settings.demo_mode_off_desc: When OFF, the demo tab in module test is hidden and the mobile demo test page will not operate.
settings.demo_mode_note: When set to OFF, the Demo and Token tabs in Module Test will be hidden, and the Demo mobile test page will not work.
settings.qr_url_rewrite_desc: In SDK mode, parses the link returned by the server and replaces it with a local test URL. Enable only when the server is on the same host.

app_hub.title: App Hub
app_hub.subtitle: Check services available for your External integration project.
app_hub.univs_demo_desc: The official demo app powered by Univs Gate SDK. Scan the QR code or open the link to experience face authentication, and manage registered users from the admin page.
app_hub.mobile_desc: Scan the QR code or open the link in a mobile browser.
app_hub.admin_desc: Manage registered users and authentication history.

support.title: Dev Support
support.test_webhook_desc: Verify webhook connectivity without affecting production.
support.notification_desc: Review alert conditions and activate as needed.
support.notification_10pct_desc: Recommend recharge before quota runs out
support.caution_1: Service may be immediately restricted upon depletion alert.
support.caution_2: Webhook will be temporarily suspended if abnormal traffic is detected.
support.test_webhook_hint: You can monitor webhook call status in real time on the module test screen.
support.notification_send_desc: You can manually send alert conditions.

forgot_password.subtitle:
Enter the email you used when signing up
We'll send you a link to reset your password
forgot_password.verify_subtitle:
We sent an 8-digit code to your email
Please enter the code you received
forgot_password.change_email: Want to enter a different email?
forgot_password.error_no_account: No account found with this email.
forgot_password.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
forgot_password.password_invalid: Password must be at least 8 characters.

network_error.description:
A network connection issue occurred.
